sections.paragraph:
fut. יִתֹּץ-

(1) to destroy, to break down, as houses, statues, altars, etc., Levit. 14:45 Jud. 6:30 , seq.; 8:17 metaph. to destroy men, Job 19:10 Psa 52:7.

(2) to break out teeth, Psa 58:7 comp. נָתַע.

Piel, i.q. Kal No. 1, 2Ch 31:1 33:3 .

Niphal, Pual, and Hophal, pass. of No. 1, Jer 4:26 Jud. 6:28 to be torn away (spoken of a rock), Nah 1:6.
